ehr_records._scenario: SIMILAR DRUG NAMES — dopamine vs dobutamine confusion trap #1
ehr_records.clinical_notes: CAUTION: dopamine and dobutamine are DIFFERENT drugs despite similar names. Do NOT deduplicate.
